reviewReply.comment: Glad we had the chance to serve you! We’d love to know what could’ve made your experience a perfect one. Your next coffee might just change that

reviews.comment:
A bubbly place open 24/7. Gives green tea options in ice tea. I picked green apple ice tea with peach pearls... Taste was awesome. Excellent date pecan cake, it's vegetarian too.

This place has their own vegan chocolate bars, sugar free chocolate shots and their own merchandise which is affordable, T shirts cost Rs. 500 each, green coffee cups at Rs. 150. I personally got 4 coffee cups and two T shirts.

A place that can be relied on for good food and bakes after 12 pm too.

reviewReply.comment: Big cheers from our crew to you! We’re so happy you enjoyed the Ice Tea. We're also glad you appreciated our merchandise, hope the coffee cups and T-shirts bring you joy with every use 😊,Come by again anytime 💛

reviewReply.comment:
Hi Jonathan,
We’re truly concerned to hear this and want to understand what may have gone wrong. Could you share more details with us over DM on our Instagram @coffee.island.india or email us at hello@coffeeisland.in, so we can look into it further? 
Your comfort and safety are a priority for us, and we’d like the chance to make things better.

reviews.name: accounts/100486096577551952970/locations/13380444637775966918/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25ReVpIazRPV1ZMV0ZwSlkzVjBTVGRRUkZKa05tYxAB

reviews.comment:
A fresh new addition to the GK 2 M Block market.

This vibrant coffee shop offers a great selection of hot and cold beverages, along with a tasty range of snacks. They also sell branded mugs (unfortunately plastic) and some souvenir T-shirts and other knick-knacks.

We tried the Flat White, the delightfully named Bobastic Coffeeccino, and a Korean Garlic Mushroom Puff.

Flat white - 8/10
Bobastic coffeeccino - 7/10
Puff - (it came cold and tasted hard and stale. They reheated it. But still wasn’t as expected)- 5/10

reviewReply.comment: Delighted you enjoyed the brews and the experience. We appreciate your note on the puff and will certainly look into it. Looking forward to welcoming you again soon.
